versions.name: Camp Bud Schiele
versions.summary: Piedmont Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on the 1,500-acre Piedmont Scout Reservation near Rutherfordton, NC, offering more than 50 merit badges, aquatics, shooting sports, COPE and climbing, and a high-adventure program.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
